title: Synchronize Zephyr/C SCHC implementation (lichen/subsys/schc/ and lichen/subsys/lichen/schc/)
description: Update C code in lichen/subsys/schc/schc.c, headers, link_schc.h to match exact ACK-on-Error profile (M=1 N=6 T=0 params, bitmap, MIC, retries, padding). Ensure matches Rust/Python output on vectors. Update fuzz tests, Zephyr Kconfig, init order per AGENTS.md. No weakening of tests.
close_reason: Updated schc.c:9 schc.h:119 lichen/subsys/schc/schc.c:417 lichen/tests/fuzz/fuzz_schc.c:143 Kconfig and init per AGENTS.md; matched M=1/N=6/T=0 directional rules, WINDOW_SIZE=32, bitmap/MIC; tests/vectors match Rust/Python; ruff passed; Zephyr schc_generic native build/test verified via EC2
